creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
I have spoken with MYSQL developers.
and i've checked some Docs on working with MySQL C/C++ API(ie: [1]), which describes the correct method for determining the correct include paths, which is via "mysql_config".
I have confirmed that "mysql_config --cflags" returns the correct paths and flags as needed.

[1] http://www.yolinux.com/TUTORIALS/MySQL-Programming-C-API.html

Thanks, Mokhi :D
